modules.module_title: Module 1: Site Supervision Basics & Safety Management

questions.question: Ek Site Supervisor ka primary role kya hota hai?

options.B: Site par daily activities aur workers ko manage karna
options.C: Project ke liye funding arrange karna

questions.explanation: Site Supervisor ka primary role hota hai site par daily construction activities aur workers ko effectively manage karna, taaki project time par aur quality standard ke according complete ho.

questions.question: PPE ka full form kya hai aur yeh construction site par kyun important hai?

options.A: Personal Project Equipment, productivity badhane ke liye
options.B: Primary Protection Element, material ko protect karne ke liye
options.C: Personal Protective Equipment, worker safety ke liye
options.D: Project Planning Estimation, cost control ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab Personal Protective Equipment hai, jaise safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes. Yeh workers ko site par hone wale accidents aur hazards se bachane ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Agar site par kisi worker ko chot lag jaye, toh Site Supervisor ka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Sabse pehle first aid provide karna aur medical help bulana
options.D: Dusre workers ko kaam continue karne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi accident ki situation mein, Site Supervisor ki pehli priority injured worker ko turant first aid provide karna aur zaroorat padne par medical help bulana hota hai.

questions.question: RAMS ka kya matlab hai construction safety mein?

options.B: Routine Activity and Manpower Scheduling

questions.explanation: RAMS ka matlab Risk Assessment and Method Statement hai. Yeh ek document hota hai jo kisi particular task se jude risks ko identify karta hai aur unhe mitigate karne ke liye safe work methods specify karta hai.

questions.question: Site layout plan mein kya-kya information shamil hoti hai?

options.B: Material storage areas, site office, access roads, safety points, etc.

questions.explanation: Site layout plan mein site par various facilities jaise material storage, site office, worker facilities, access roads, emergency exits aur safety points ki location detailed hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek toolbox talk ka uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Workers ko specific task se related safety precautions batana
options.D: Project ke budget par charcha karna

questions.explanation: Toolbox talk ek short safety meeting hoti hai jo daily work start hone se pehle ki jaati hai, jisme workers ko specific task se jude hazards aur unki safety precautions ke baare mein bataya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar site par fire hazard ka risk ho, toh Supervisor ko kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Fire extinguishers properly maintained aur accessible hon
options.D: Sabhi workers ko site se bahar bhej den

questions.explanation: Fire hazard ke risk ko manage karne ke liye, Site Supervisor ko ensure karna chahiye ki fire extinguishers available hon, functional hon aur easily accessible hon. Workers ko unhe use karna bhi aana chahiye.

questions.question: Construction site par scaffolding ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Workers ke liye safe working platform provide karna

questions.explanation: Scaffolding workers ko height par kaam karne ke liye ek safe aur stable platform provide karta hai, jisse unki safety ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Hot work permit kab zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Jab bhi cement mix kiya jaata hai
options.B: Jab welding, cutting ya grinding jaise kaam hote hain jisse heat ya sparks generate ho
options.D: Jab laborers lunch break par hon

questions.explanation: Hot work permit tab zaroori hota hai jab site par aise kaam kiye ja rahe hon jisse heat, sparks ya open flame generate ho sakte hain, jaise welding, cutting, grinding, taaki fire risk ko control kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Confined space mein kaam karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation, gas detection aur rescue plan hona chahiye
options.C: Extra laborers ko andar bhejna chahiye
options.D: Koi special precaution ki zaroorat nahi hai

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein oxygen deficiency, toxic gases aur other hazards ka risk hota hai. Isliye proper ventilation, atmosphere testing (gas detection), aur ek well-defined rescue plan bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Site Supervisor ko daily site inspection kyun karni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf attendance check karne ke liye
options.B: Safety hazards identify karne aur work progress check karne ke liye
options.C: Material order list banane ke liye
options.D: Client se meeting karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Daily site inspection se Site Supervisor safety hazards ko identify kar pata hai aur work progress ko monitor kar paata hai, jisse issues ko time par address kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Work at height ke liye kya safety measures zaroori hain?

options.B: Safety harnesses, guardrails aur secure platforms ka use karna
options.C: Workers ko gloves pehenne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Work at height mein fall protection sabse critical hai. Iske liye safety harnesses, guardrails, toe boards aur secure working platforms jaise measures lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Electrical safety ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye site par?

options.B: Damaged electrical cables aur equipment ko turant repair ya replace karna
options.C: Water ke paas electrical work karna
options.D: Temporary wiring ko permanent wiring ki tarah treat karna

questions.explanation: Electrical hazards se bachne ke liye, damaged electrical cables, tools aur equipment ko turant repair ya replace karna chahiye. Proper earthing aur insulation bhi check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hazard identification ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Potential dangers ya risks ko pehchanana jo workers ko nuksaan pahuncha sakte hain

questions.explanation: Hazard identification ka matlab hai construction site par maujood un sabhi cheezon, situations ya conditions ko pehchanana jinse workers ko chot lag sakti hai ya unki health ko nuksaan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Site par emergency evacuation plan kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Visitors ko guide karne ke liye
options.B: Emergency ki sthiti mein sabhi logon ko safely site se nikalne ke liye
options.C: Material delivery track karne ke liye
options.D: Daily progress report file karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency evacuation plan site par kisi bhi aakasmik sthiti (jaise fire, earthquake) mein sabhi logon, khaaskar workers ko, surakshit roop se site se nikalne ke liye ek structured approach provide karta hai.

questions.question: Stop Work Authority (SWA) ka kya significance hai?

options.A: Workers ko kaam rokne ki permission dena jab unhe koi safety concern na ho
options.B: Kisi bhi worker ko kaam rokne ka adhikar dena agar unhe lagta hai ki kaam unsafe hai
options.C: Sirf Site Supervisor ko kaam rokne ka adhikar dena
options.D: Contractor ko kaam rokne ke liye majboor karna

questions.explanation: Stop Work Authority ek safety principle hai jismein kisi bhi worker ko adhikar hota hai ki woh kaam ko rok sake agar unhe lagta hai ki kaam unsafe hai ya usse kisi ko khatra ho sakta hai. Yeh safety culture ko promote karta hai.

questions.question: Excavation work ke dauran soil collapse se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek worker ko andar bhejna
options.B: Shoring, sloping ya trench boxes ka use karna
options.C: Excavated soil ko trench ke bilkul kinare par rakhna

questions.explanation: Excavation ke dauran soil collapse ek bada khatra hai. Isse bachne ke liye shoring (support structures), sloping (excavation sides ko angle dena) ya trench boxes (protective enclosures) ka use karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Cement ko store karte waqt kin baaton ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Moisture se bachana aur elevated platform par store karna
options.D: Dusre materials ke saath mix kar ke rakhna

questions.explanation: Cement bahut hygroscopic hota hai, matlab yeh moisture absorb karta hai. Isliye isse moisture se bachana aur zameen se upar (elevated platform par) store karna chahiye, taaki uski strength intact rahe.

questions.question: Aggregate (ret aur bajri) ki quality check karne ke liye kya dekha jaata hai?

options.B: Cleanliness, size distribution aur strength

questions.explanation: Aggregate ki quality ke liye uski cleanliness (dust, clay, organic impurities se free), proper size distribution (grading) aur strength (crushing value) ko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: TMT bars ka kya matlab hai aur yeh construction mein kyun use hote hain?

options.A: Treated Material Technology, sirf decorative purposes ke liye
options.B: Thermo-Mechanically Treated, high strength aur ductility provide karne ke liye
options.C: Total Material Transfer, material transport ke liye
options.D: Temporary Material Type, temporary structures ke liye

questions.explanation: TMT bars (Thermo-Mechanically Treated) high strength aur ductility (lacchilapan) provide karte hain, jisse structures earthquake resistant bante hain. Yeh RCC construction mein reinforcement ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Concrete ki strength kis factor par sabse zyada depend karti hai?

options.B: Water-cement ratio par

questions.explanation: Concrete ki strength water-cement ratio par direct depend karti hai. Low water-cement ratio (within limits) high strength concrete deta hai, jabki high ratio weak concrete banata hai.

questions.question: Slump test kyun kiya jaata hai concrete ke liye?

options.A: Concrete ki strength check karne ke liye
options.B: Concrete ki workability (kaam karne mein aasani) check karne ke liye
options.C: Concrete ka colour check karne ke liye
options.D: Concrete ka setting time check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Slump test concrete ki workability ya consistency check karne ke liye kiya jaata hai. Yeh batata hai ki concrete kitna geela ya dry hai aur use place karna kitna aasan hoga.

questions.question: Curing of concrete ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Concrete ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.B: Concrete ki proper hydration aur strength gain ke liye moisture maintain karna
options.C: Concrete ko colour dene ke liye
options.D: Concrete ko rough banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Curing concrete ko ek specific period tak moisture aur temperature control mein rakhne ki process hai, jisse cement ka hydration process complete ho aur concrete apni maximum strength achieve kar sake.

questions.question: Bricks ki quality check karte waqt kya dekha jaata hai?

options.B: Uniform size, shape, colour aur sound test

questions.explanation: Achhi quality ki bricks uniform size, shape aur colour ki hoti hain. Jab do bricks ko aapas mein takraya jaata hai toh metallic ringing sound aana chahiye. Water absorption bhi kam hona chahiye.

questions.question: Steel reinforcement ko store karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Rust se bachane ke liye elevated aur dry jagah par store karna
options.C: Dusre metals ke saath mix karna

questions.explanation: Steel reinforcement ko rust se bachana bahut zaroori hai, kyunki rust uski bond strength ko concrete ke saath kam kar deta hai. Isliye usse dry aur elevated platform par store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Admixtures kya hote hain aur kyun use kiye jaate hain concrete mein?

options.B: Cement ke substitute
options.C: Chemical agents jo concrete ki properties (jaise workability, setting time) ko modify karte hain
options.D: Concrete ko colourful banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Admixtures chemical substances hote hain jo concrete mix mein add kiye jaate hain takki uski workability, setting time, strength, durability jaise properties ko improve kiya ja sake.

questions.question: First-in, First-out (FIFO) principle material management mein kyun follow kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sabse naye material ko pehle use karne ke liye
options.B: Sabse purane material ko pehle use karne ke liye, wastage kam karne aur expiry se bachne ke liye
options.C: Material ko randomly use karne ke liye
options.D: Material inventory ko badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: FIFO principle yeh ensure karta hai ki jo material pehle aaya hai use pehle use kiya jaaye. Yeh specially perishable items jaise cement ke liye important hai, taaki unki expiry date se pehle use ho sake aur wastage na ho.

questions.question: Quality control ke liye Cube test kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Concrete ki workability check karne ke liye
options.B: Hardened concrete ki compressive strength check karne ke liye
options.C: Concrete ka temperature check karne ke liye
options.D: Concrete ka colour check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cube test hardened concrete ki compressive strength check karne ke liye kiya jaata hai. Concrete cubes ko site par cast kiya jaata hai aur specified curing ke baad laboratory mein test kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Building construction mein Timber (wood) ki quality kaise judge ki jaati hai?

options.B: Knots, cracks, decay aur moisture content check karke

questions.explanation: Timber ki quality usmein maujood defects jaise knots (ganthen), cracks, decay (sadna) aur uske moisture content se judge ki jaati hai. Achha timber straight-grained aur defect-free hota hai.

questions.question: Water used for concrete mixing ki kya quality honi chahiye?

options.A: Koi bhi water use kar sakte hain
options.B: Potable (peene layak) aur impurities se free hona chahiye

questions.explanation: Concrete mixing ke liye use hone wala paani potable (peene layak) hona chahiye aur usmein salts, acids, oils, organic matter jaise impurities nahi honi chahiye, kyunki yeh concrete ki strength ko negatively affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Material reconciliation ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Site par received aur actually consumed material ki quantity ko compare karna, wastage aur theft control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Material reconciliation mein received material aur consumed material ka comparison kiya jaata hai. Isse material wastage, theft aur pilferage ko track aur control kiya ja sakta hai, jisse cost savings hoti hain.

questions.question: Cement ke bags ko kitni height tak stack karna safe hota hai?

options.B: 10 bags se zyada nahi

questions.explanation: Cement bags ko 10 bags se zyada height tak stack nahi karna chahiye, taaki stability bani rahe aur collapse ka risk kam ho. Stacking walls se 60 cm (2 feet) door honi chahiye.

questions.question: Plasticizer admixture ka kya kaam hota hai concrete mein?

options.B: Concrete ki strength kam karna
options.C: Workability badhana without increasing water content

questions.explanation: Plasticizer (water reducer) admixtures concrete ki workability ko increase karte hain, jisse same slump achieve karne ke liye kam paani ki zaroorat padti hai. Isse strength improve hoti hai aur segregation kam hota hai.

questions.question: Reinforcement bars ki bending kaise karni chahiye?

options.B: Drawing aur design ke according, proper bending radius maintain karte hue

questions.explanation: Reinforcement bars ki bending hamesha drawings aur design specifications ke according hi karni chahiye. Proper bending radius maintain karna zaroori hai, taaki bar mein cracks na aaye aur uski strength maintain rahe.

questions.question: Footing ka kya uddeshya hota hai building construction mein?

options.B: Structure ke load ko soil par distribute karna
options.D: Bijli ki wiring ke liye jagah banana

questions.explanation: Footing foundation ka ek important part hai jo building ke saare load ko safely aur evenly surrounding soil par distribute karta hai, taaki settlement aur structural failure na ho.

questions.question: RCC ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Reinforced Cement Concrete

questions.explanation: RCC ka full form Reinforced Cement Concrete hai. Ismein steel reinforcement bars ko concrete ke andar dala jaata hai, jisse concrete ki compressive strength aur steel ki tensile strength ka fayda uthaya ja sake.

questions.question: Shuttering ya Formwork ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Fresh concrete ko desired shape aur support provide karna jab tak woh set na ho jaye

questions.explanation: Shuttering ya Formwork ek temporary structure hota hai jo fresh concrete ko uski casting ke dauran desired shape, size aur support provide karta hai, jab tak concrete apni initial strength gain na kar le.

questions.question: Column casting se pehle kya check karna bahut zaroori hai?

options.B: Verticality (plumb), reinforcement ki correct placement aur cover block use hue hain ya nahi

questions.explanation: Column casting se pehle uski exact verticality (plumb), reinforcement bars ki sahi placement, stirrups ki spacing aur cover blocks ka use check karna critical hai, taaki structural integrity bani rahe.

questions.question: Concrete compaction kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Concrete ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.B: Concrete se air voids nikalne aur uski density aur strength badhane ke liye
options.C: Concrete ko light banane ke liye
options.D: Concrete ko colour dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Concrete compaction vibrating needles ya hand tamping se kiya jaata hai, taaki fresh concrete mein trapped air voids nikal jayein. Isse concrete dense, strong aur durable banta hai.

questions.question: Plastering se pehle walls par kya preparation karni chahiye?

options.B: Walls ko achhe se clean aur wet karna

questions.explanation: Plastering se pehle walls ko dust, loose particles se clean karna aur achhe se wet karna zaroori hai. Isse plaster aur wall ke beech achha bond banta hai aur plaster ki cracking kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Masonry work mein 'bond' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bricks ko is tarah arrange karna ki joints overlap hon, taaki structure stable aur strong ho

questions.explanation: 'Bond' masonry mein bricks ko arrange karne ka tareeka hai, jismein vertical joints overlap hote hain. Isse wall ki strength, stability aur appearance improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Backfilling ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Excavated area ko soil ya aggregate se wapas bharna

questions.explanation: Backfilling mein excavated area ko soil, sand ya aggregate jaise materials se wapas bhara jaata hai, typically foundations, trenches ya basements ke aas-paas, taaki support provide kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Cranes aur heavy machinery operate karte waqt kya safety precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Properly trained aur certified operators, load charts follow karna, aur clear communication (signals) maintain karna

questions.explanation: Cranes aur heavy machinery ke operation mein safety critical hai. Certified operators, load charts ka strict adherence, proper rigging, aur clear communication signals safety ensure karte hain.

questions.question: Centering aur Shuttering kab remove karni chahiye?

options.B: Jab concrete ne required strength achieve kar li ho, design aur standard ke according

questions.explanation: Centering aur Shuttering ko tabhi remove karna chahiye jab concrete ne apni required strength achieve kar li ho. Iske liye specific timeframes hote hain jo structural design aur relevant codes par depend karte hain, taaki structure ko nuksaan na ho.

questions.question: PCC ka kya matlab hai aur yeh kahan use hota hai?

options.A: Precast Concrete Column, columns ke liye
options.B: Plain Cement Concrete, leveling course aur protective layer ke liye
options.C: Polymer Coated Concrete, waterproofing ke liye
options.D: Power Compacted Concrete, roads ke liye

questions.explanation: PCC ka matlab Plain Cement Concrete hai. Ismein steel reinforcement nahi hota hai. Yeh usually leveling course (e.g., foundation ke niche) aur protective layer ke roop mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Ready Mix Concrete (RMC) ke kya fayde hain?

options.A: Site par zyada mess hota hai
options.B: Consistent quality, faster construction aur reduced labor

questions.explanation: RMC ek central plant mein taiyar kiya jaata hai aur site par delivery kiya jaata hai. Iske fayde hain consistent quality, faster construction, kam labor requirement aur site par kam pollution/mess.

questions.question: Damp Proof Course (DPC) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ground se aane wali moisture ko walls mein upar chadne se rokna
options.C: Bijli ki wiring ke liye jagah banana

questions.explanation: Damp Proof Course (DPC) ek waterproof barrier hota hai jo walls mein ground level se thoda upar provide kiya jaata hai, taaki ground se aane wali moisture (rising dampness) walls mein upar na chade.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a vibrator in concrete work?

options.A: To mix the concrete more effectively
options.B: To remove air bubbles from the concrete (compaction)
options.C: To heat the concrete in cold weather
options.D: To give a smooth finish to the concrete surface

questions.explanation: Concrete vibrator ka use fresh concrete se trapped air bubbles ko nikalne (compaction) ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse concrete dense, strong aur void-free banta hai.

questions.question: Pre-stressed concrete kya hota hai?

options.A: Concrete jo pehle se stress mein ho
options.B: Concrete jismein steel tendons ko tension kiya jaata hai taaki woh external loads ko resist kar sake
options.C: Concrete jo bahut jaldi set hota hai
options.D: Concrete jismein koi reinforcement na ho

questions.explanation: Pre-stressed concrete mein high-strength steel tendons ko concrete pour karne se pehle ya baad mein tension kiya jaata hai, jisse concrete mein compressive stresses induce hote hain. Yeh external loads ko efficiently resist karta hai aur crack formation kam karta hai.

questions.question: Pointing (masonry work) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Mortar joints ko finish karna aur weather resistance provide karna

questions.explanation: Pointing masonry walls mein exposed mortar joints ko finish karne ki process hai, jisse wall ki aesthetic appearance improve hoti hai aur weather resistance (paani ka andar aana) bhi badhti hai.

questions.question: Pile foundation kab use ki jaati hai?

options.B: Jab surface soil weak ho aur deep, strong strata par load transfer karna ho
options.C: Sirf single storey building ke liye
options.D: Jab building ka weight bahut kam ho

questions.explanation: Pile foundation tab use ki jaati hai jab surface soil weak ya compressible ho aur building ka load ek deep, strong soil strata tak transfer karna ho. Yeh heavy structures ke liye common hai.

questions.question: Architectural drawing mein 'Plan' view kya dikhata hai?

options.B: Building ka top view, walls, doors, windows, rooms ke layout ke saath

questions.explanation: Plan view building ka top-down perspective dikhata hai, jaise ki building ko ek horizontal plane par kaat kar upar se dekha gaya ho. Ismein walls, doors, windows, room dimensions aur layout hote hain.

questions.question: Structural drawing mein 'Section' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Building ko vertically kaat kar andar ke details (beams, columns, slabs, foundation) dikhana

questions.explanation: Section drawing building ko vertically kaat kar uske andar ke structural components jaise beams, columns, slabs, foundation aur unke reinforcement details ko dikhata hai.

questions.question: Drawing mein 'Scale' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Drawing ki beauty badhane ke liye
options.B: Actual dimensions ko proportionately chhota karke drawing par dikhana
options.C: Drawing ko bada karne ke liye
options.D: Drawing ka weight kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Scale drawing mein actual object ki dimensions ko ek specific ratio mein chhota karke represent karta hai, taaki ek bade structure ko ek chote paper par accurately dikhaya ja sake.

questions.question: Beam schedule mein kya information hoti hai?

options.B: Beam ki size, reinforcement details (bars ka diameter, quantity, cutting length) aur concrete grade
options.D: Beam ko ban banane wala worker ka naam

questions.explanation: Beam schedule ek table hota hai jo har beam ki complete details provide karta hai, jaise uski cross-section size, main reinforcement bars, stirrups (rings) ki details, concrete grade aur other relevant specifications.

questions.question: Foundation plan mein kya dikhaya jaata hai?

options.B: Footings, columns, grade beams aur foundation se related saari structural details

questions.explanation: Foundation plan building ke foundation system ki details dikhata hai, jismein footings, columns, grade beams, foundation walls aur unki dimensions aur locations shamil hoti hain.

questions.question: BOQ ka full form kya hai aur iska kya use hai?

options.A: Building Order Quantity, material order karne ke liye
options.B: Bill of Quantities, project mein required items aur unki quantities ki detailed list
options.C: Building Operations Quality, quality control ke liye
options.D: Basic Output Quota, labor productivity check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: BOQ (Bill of Quantities) ek detailed document hai jo project mein hone wale har kaam aur uski quantity ko specify karta hai. Yeh tendering, costing aur project progress tracking ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Leveling instrument (jaise Dumpy Level ya Auto Level) ka kya use hai site par?

options.B: Relative heights ya elevations ko measure karna

questions.explanation: Leveling instruments ka use site par alag-alag points ki relative heights ya elevations ko accurately measure karne ke liye hota hai, jo foundation, slab, floor finishing jaise kaam ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Cutting Length of Stirrups (rings) calculate karne ke liye kya formula use hota hai?

options.B: P = L*B

questions.explanation: Stirrups ki cutting length calculate karne ke liye, perimeter (2*(length + breadth)) mein hook lengths add ki jaati hain aur bend deductions (90 degree bends ke liye 2d, 135 degree bends ke liye 3d, where d is diameter of bar) minus kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Centerline method ka kya fayda hai quantity estimation mein?

options.B: Calculations ko simplify karta hai aur time bachata hai, khaaskar uniform walls ke liye
options.C: Sirf material cost calculate karta hai

questions.explanation: Centerline method estimation mein total centerline length calculate karke, common cross-section areas se multiply kiya jaata hai. Yeh calculations ko simplify karta hai aur time efficient hai, especially for structures with uniform wall thicknesses.

questions.question: Rebar Schedule mein 'TMT 12 @ 150 C/C' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: 12 mm diameter TMT bars ko 150 mm spacing par corner to corner lagana hai
options.B: 12 mm diameter TMT bars ko 150 mm spacing par center to center lagana hai
options.C: 12 TMT bars ko 150 cm spacing par lagana hai
options.D: 12 gauge TMT wire 150 cm lambi hai

questions.explanation: Is notation ka matlab hai ki Thermo-Mechanically Treated (TMT) bars ka diameter 12 mm hai aur unhe 150 mm (15 cm) ke center-to-center spacing par place karna hai.

questions.question: Area calculation ke liye square ya rectangular room ki formula kya hai?

options.B: Length * Width

questions.explanation: Ek square ya rectangular room ka area uski length ko uski width se multiply karke calculate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Volume of concrete for a slab (length x width x thickness) calculate karne ke liye units kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Meter, Meter, Centimeter
options.C: Sabhi units same honi chahiye, jaise Meters, Meters, Meters

questions.explanation: Volume calculation ke liye sabhi dimensions ko same units mein hona zaroori hai, jaise agar length aur width meters mein hain toh thickness bhi meters mein honi chahiye, taaki result cubic meters mein aaye.

questions.question: Plot plan ya Site plan kya dikhata hai?

options.B: Building ki location property line, roads, landscaping aur utilities ke reference mein

questions.explanation: Plot plan ya Site plan building ki location ko property boundaries, nearby roads, landscaping features, utility connections (water, sewer, electricity) aur site contours ke reference mein dikhata hai.

questions.question: Door schedule mein kya information hoti hai?

options.B: Door ki size, type, material, finish aur hardware details

questions.explanation: Door schedule ek table hota hai jo har door ki detailed specifications provide karta hai, jaise uski width, height, type (flush, panelled), material, finish, fire rating aur hardware (hinges, locks) details.

questions.question: Total Station ka kya use hai modern construction surveying mein?

options.B: Angles aur distances ko accurately measure karne ke liye, aur coordinate data collect karne ke liye
options.C: Material ka weight check karne ke liye
options.D: Concrete ki strength check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Total Station ek advanced surveying instrument hai jo horizontal aur vertical angles, slope distances ko electronic tarike se measure karta hai. Yeh layout, setting out aur as-built surveys ke liye bahut accurate hai.

questions.question: Skirting ki measurement kaise ki jaati hai?

options.B: Room ke perimeter (lambai + chaudai ka dugna) se, doors ke openings ko minus karke

questions.explanation: Skirting (ya dado rail) ki measurement room ke perimeter se ki jaati hai. Doors ke openings ko total perimeter se minus kiya jaata hai kyunki wahan skirting nahi lagti.

questions.question: Wastage factor kyun apply kiya jaata hai material estimation mein?

options.A: Material ki cost badhane ke liye
options.B: Cutting losses, breakage aur handling losses ko account karne ke liye
options.C: Material ko kam order karne ke liye
options.D: Material ki quality check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Wastage factor material estimation mein apply kiya jaata hai taaki cutting losses, breakage, theft, spillages aur other handling losses ko cover kiya ja sake. Yeh ensure karta hai ki site par required quantity se kam material na pade.

questions.question: Daily Progress Report (DPR) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Daily work progress, labor attendance, material consumption aur site issues ko track karne ke liye
options.C: Workers ki salary calculate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: DPR ek critical document hai jo daily work progress, deployed labor, consumed materials, equipment usage, site problems aur safety observations ko record karta hai. Yeh project monitoring aur decision making mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Site par labor management mein Supervisor ki kya zimmedari hai?

options.B: Workers ko assign tasks dena, unki productivity monitor karna, safety ensure karna aur conflicts resolve karna

questions.explanation: Supervisor ki zimmedari hai workers ko tasks assign karna, unki performance monitor karna, site safety rules follow karwana, aur workers ke beech hone wale kisi bhi conflict ko solve karna.

questions.question: Site Instruction (SI) ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Workers ko chutti dene ke liye
options.B: Project Manager ya Client se formal instructions ya changes ko Site Supervisor tak convey karna

questions.explanation: Site Instruction (SI) ek formal document hai jo Project Manager ya Client ki taraf se Site Supervisor ko diya jaata hai. Ismein design changes, work scope variations ya other critical instructions hote hain jinhe site par implement karna hota hai.

questions.question: Good communication skills ek Site Supervisor ke liye kyun important hain?

options.A: Sirf client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Workers, management aur other stakeholders ke saath effective coordination, problem solving aur instructions dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective communication Supervisor ko workers ko clear instructions dene, problems solve karne, management ko updates dene aur sabhi stakeholders ke saath achha coordination maintain karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Site meeting mein kya discuss kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Project progress, upcoming tasks, safety concerns, quality issues aur resource requirements

questions.explanation: Site meetings mein project ki current progress review ki jaati hai, future plans discuss kiye jaate hain, safety aur quality issues par baat hoti hai, aur resource needs ko identify kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Attendance register maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf workers ko ginti karne ke liye
options.B: Labor cost calculate karne, productivity monitor karne aur safety ke liye (in case of emergency)
options.C: Material delivery track karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Attendance register labor cost calculation, individual worker productivity analysis aur emergency situations mein site par maujood logon ki accurate count ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Conflict resolution mein Site Supervisor ka kya role hai?

options.B: Neutral rehkar parties ke beech mediation karna aur fair solution nikalna
options.C: Sirf ek party ka saath dena
options.D: Dono parties ko kaam se nikal dena

questions.explanation: Supervisor ko conflicts ko resolve karne mein neutral rehkar mediate karna chahiye, dono sides ko sunna chahiye aur ek fair, practical solution dhundhna chahiye jo project ke हित mein ho.

questions.question: Permit-to-Work (PTW) system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: High-risk activities ko safely plan, authorize aur control karna

questions.explanation: PTW system high-risk activities jaise hot work, confined space entry, electrical work ke liye zaroori hai. Yeh ensure karta hai ki kaam shuru karne se pehle saare hazards identify ho jayein aur proper safety measures implement kiye jayein.

questions.question: Site logbook mein kya record kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Daily events, visitors, deliveries, incidents, instructions aur major observations

questions.explanation: Site logbook mein daily ke sabhi important events, jaise visitors, material deliveries, minor incidents, special instructions, aur general site observations ko record kiya jaata hai. Yeh ek legal record bhi hota hai.

questions.question: Toolbox talks ke liye sahi frequency kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Daily ya jab bhi naya task shuru ho

questions.explanation: Toolbox talks daily ya jab bhi koi naya ya high-risk task shuru ho, tab conduct kiye jaane chahiye, taaki workers ko latest safety information aur task-specific hazards ke baare mein update kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Induction training naye workers ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unki skills check karne ke liye
options.B: Unhe site specific safety rules, emergency procedures aur general site layout se familiarize karwane ke liye
options.C: Unhe project ka detailed design batane ke liye
options.D: Unhe kaam par turant lagane ke liye

questions.explanation: Induction training naye workers ko site ke specific safety rules, emergency procedures, site layout, first aid points aur unke roles aur responsibilities se familiarize karwati hai, jisse accidents ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Material Requisition Form (MRF) ka kya use hai?

options.A: Material ko dispose karne ke liye
options.B: Site par required materials ko officially order karne ke liye
options.C: Material ki quality check karne ke liye
options.D: Material ko store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: MRF ek form hota hai jisse Site Supervisor ya Storekeeper required materials ki list officially purchase department ko bhejte hain, taaki materials site par timely deliver ho sakein.

questions.question: Site par discipline maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf workers ko darane ke liye
options.B: Safety, productivity aur smooth workflow ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Supervisor ki power dikhane ke liye
options.D: Workers ko kaam se nikalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Discipline maintain karna safety rules follow karwane, productivity badhane, aur site par ek organized aur efficient working environment create karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Record keeping ki importance construction site par kya hai?

options.B: Future reference, legal compliance, dispute resolution aur project analysis ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper record keeping (DPRs, material receipts, safety reports, meeting minutes) future reference, legal requirements fulfill karne, disputes settle karne aur project ke performance ko analyze karne ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Shift Handover (shift change ke waqt) ke dauran kya information pass karni chahiye?

options.B: Pending tasks, critical issues, equipment status, safety concerns aur special instructions

questions.explanation: Effective shift handover mein incoming Supervisor ko pending tasks, koi bhi critical issues, equipment ki status, safety alerts aur special instructions ke baare mein detailed brief dena chahiye, taaki work continuity bani rahe aur koi information miss na ho.

questions.question: Visitor logbook maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Visitors ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Safety aur security reasons ke liye, aur in case of emergency pata chale kaun site par hai
options.C: Visitors se paise lene ke liye
options.D: Visitors ko material bechne ke liye

questions.explanation: Visitor logbook security ke liye zaroori hai, taaki pata chale kaun site par aaya aur kab. Emergency ki sthiti mein bhi yeh list helpful hoti hai ki kitne log site par hain.

questions.question: Performance appraisal (kaarj pradarshan moolyankan) ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Workers ki performance evaluate karna, unki strengths aur weaknesses identify karna, aur development areas suggest karna

questions.explanation: Performance appraisal workers ki performance ko objectively evaluate karta hai. Isse unki strengths aur weaknesses ko pehchana jaata hai, aur unhe further training ya development ke liye guide kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Project Schedule mein 'Critical Path' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabse chhota rasta project complete karne ka
options.B: Tasks ka sequence jinko complete hone mein sabse zyada time lagta hai aur jinmein koi float (flexibility) nahi hota, isse project ki total duration determine hoti hai

questions.explanation: Critical Path project schedule mein tasks ka woh sequence hai jiske delay hone se poora project delay ho jaata hai. Ismein koi float ya flexibility nahi hoti, isliye in tasks ko closely monitor karna hota hai.

questions.question: Progress monitoring kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Project ke actual progress ko planned schedule se compare karna aur deviations ko identify karna
options.C: Workers ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Progress monitoring project ke actual physical progress ko project schedule aur budget se compare karta hai. Isse delays ya cost overruns ko time par identify karke corrective actions liye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Waste management site par kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf site ko saaf dikhane ke liye
options.B: Environmental compliance, cost savings aur safety ke liye
options.C: Extra labor hire karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper waste management environmental pollution kam karta hai, waste disposal costs ko reduce karta hai, aur site ko safer banata hai. Ismein waste segregation, reuse aur recycling shamil hai.

questions.question: Environmental compliance ka kya matlab hai construction sector mein?

options.B: Environmental laws aur regulations ko follow karna, jaise dust control, noise pollution control, waste disposal norms

questions.explanation: Environmental compliance ka matlab hai construction activities ko environmental laws aur regulations ke according conduct karna. Ismein dust control, noise reduction, water pollution prevention, aur proper waste management shamil hai.

questions.question: Project completion ke baad Site closure process mein kya steps shamil hote hain?

options.B: Site ki final cleanup, equipment removal, temporary structures dismantle karna aur final documentation

questions.explanation: Site closure mein site ki complete cleanup, sabhi temporary structures (site office, storage sheds) ko dismantle karna, equipment remove karna, site ko original state mein restore karna aur saare final documents submit karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Quality Assurance (QA) aur Quality Control (QC) mein kya antar hai?

options.B: QA process-oriented hai (how to build quality), jabki QC product-oriented hai (checking if quality is built)
options.C: QA sirf documentation hai, QC sirf inspection hai
options.D: QA sirf client ke liye hai, QC sirf site ke liye hai

questions.explanation: QA (Quality Assurance) process aur systems par focus karta hai, taaki quality ko prevent kiya ja sake (right first time). QC (Quality Control) finished product ya work ko inspect karta hai aur defects ko identify karta hai.

questions.question: Budget monitoring ka kya role hai Site Supervisor ke liye?

options.A: Sirf Project Manager ka kaam hai
options.B: Material aur labor consumption ko track karna, taaki project budget ke andar rahe

questions.explanation: Site Supervisor ko material aur labor consumption ko closely monitor karna chahiye. Yeh budget se deviations ko identify karne aur cost-effective solutions dhundhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Bar bending schedule (BBS) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf steel bars ko count karna
options.B: Steel reinforcement ki accurate cutting aur bending lengths provide karna, wastage kam karna

questions.explanation: BBS steel reinforcement bars ki exact cutting aur bending lengths ki detailed list hoti hai. Yeh steel wastage ko kam karta hai, fabrication process ko streamline karta hai aur cost savings karta hai.

questions.question: Risk management ka kya matlab hai project mein?

options.B: Potential risks ko identify karna, unka assessment karna aur unhe mitigate karne ke liye plans banana

questions.explanation: Risk management mein project ko affect karne wale potential risks (safety, financial, operational) ko identify kiya jaata hai, unki likelihood aur impact ko assess kiya jaata hai, aur unhe kam karne ya avoid karne ke liye strategies banayi jaati hain.

questions.question: Value engineering ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Cost reduce karna without compromising on quality aur functionality

questions.explanation: Value engineering ek systematic approach hai jismein project ke design, materials aur methods ko analyze kiya jaata hai taaki cost ko reduce kiya ja sake, functionality aur quality ko maintain rakhte hue ya improve karte hue.

questions.question: Sustainability in construction ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmentally responsible, resource-efficient aur socially beneficial construction practices adopt karna

questions.explanation: Sustainability in construction mein aise methods aur materials ka use karna shamil hai jo environmental impact ko kam karte hain, resources ko efficiently use karte hain aur long-term societal benefits provide karte hain.

questions.question: Snag list (Punch list) kab banayi jaati hai?

options.B: Project completion ke kareeb, minor defects aur incomplete items ko identify karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Snag list ya Punch list project completion ke kareeb banayi jaati hai. Ismein woh sabhi minor defects, incomplete items ya finishing issues record kiye jaate hain jinhe final handover se pehle theek karna hota hai.

questions.question: Client satisfaction Site Supervisor ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf extra bonus lene ke liye
options.B: Future business opportunities, good reputation aur project ke smooth handover ke liye
options.C: Sirf project ko jaldi khatam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client satisfaction bahut important hai kyunki yeh future projects, company ki reputation aur project ke successful handover ke liye critical hai. Satisfied client positive feedback aur referrals dete hain.

questions.question: As-Built Drawings ka kya use hai?

options.B: Final structure ko accurately represent karna, jismein site par hue saare changes shamil hon

questions.explanation: As-Built Drawings final drawings hote hain jo site par actually constructed structure ko reflect karte hain, jismein original design drawings se saare deviations aur changes (jaise pipe routing, electrical conduit changes) shamil hote hain. Yeh future maintenance aur renovations ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: Post-construction audit (nirman ke baad ka audit) ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Project ke performance ko analyze karna, lessons learned identify karna aur future projects ke liye best practices develop karna

questions.explanation: Post-construction audit mein project ke success aur failures ko analyze kiya jaata hai. Isse lessons learned identify hote hain, jo future projects ki planning aur execution ko improve karne mein help karte hain.
